records.question: Which departments are located in Linderman with a budget of at most 601283.6, where instructor Desyl earns exactly 48803.38 and student Porter has at most 111 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE student.name = 'Porter' AND instructor.salary = 48803.38 AND department.building = 'Linderman' AND department.budget <= 601283.6 AND instructor.name = 'Desyl' AND student.tot_cred <= 111
records.pred_sql: select department.dept_name from department join instructor on department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name join student on department.dept_name = student.dept_name where lower(department.building) like '%linderman%' and department.budget <= 601283.6 and lower(instructor.name) like '%desyl%' and instructor.salary = 48803.38 and lower(student.name) like '%porter%' and student.tot_cred <= 111 limit 5;
records.thought: Filter departments located in Linderman with budget <= 601283.6, having an instructor named Desyl with salary 48803.38, and a student named Porter with tot_cred <= 111.

records.question: Which departments are located in the Saucon building and have an instructor named Lembr teaching the 4-credit course titled Quantum Mechanics, with students having at most 113 total credits?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT department.dept_name FROM department
JOIN course ON department.dept_name = course.dept_name
JOIN instructor ON department.dept_name = instructor.dept_name
JOIN student ON department.dept_name = student.dept_name
WHERE instructor.name = 'Lembr' AND course.credits = 4 AND course.title = 'Quantum Mechanics' AND department.building = 'Saucon' AND student.tot_cred <= 113
records.pred_sql:
select distinct department.dept_name
from department
join instructor on instructor.dept_name = department.dept_name
join teaches on teaches.ID = instructor.ID
join section on section.course_id = teaches.course_id and section.sec_id = teaches.sec_id and section.semester = teaches.semester and section.year = teaches.year
join course on course.course_id = section.course_id
join takes on takes.course_id = section.course_id and takes.sec_id = section.sec_id and takes.semester = section.semester and takes.year = section.year
join student on student.ID = takes.ID
where lower(department.building) = '%saucon%'
  and lower(instructor.name) like '%lembr%'
  and course.credits = 4
  and lower(course.title) like '%quantum mechanics%'
  and student.tot_cred <= 113
limit 5
records.thought: Filter departments located in the Saucon building that have an instructor named like 'lembr' teaching a 4-credit course titled like 'quantum mechanics' with students having at most 113 total credits, joining relevant tables to apply all conditions.
